category_sources: source_facts.description says GNU data compression program; official GNU page describes Gzip as a popular data compression program.
display_name_sources: Official GNU project page uses GNU Gzip; source_facts.name provides gzip.
docs_sources: Official GNU Gzip manual page provides the online manual in multiple formats and the single-page HTML manual.
repo_sources: Official Savannah Git repositories page for GNU gzip lists anonymous clone URL https://git.savannah.gnu.org/git/gzip.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNU page identify gzip as a GNU compression utility; source_facts.executables list gzip, gunzip, zcat, and related CLI tools.
